title: Cobblemon x NIT Integration
description: An addon for Cobblemon and New In Town adding Cobblemon-themed structures
body:
How often do you find yourself playing Minecraft and think to yourself:
> "I wish I could raise Pokémon and live in a town like in the Pokémon games"

Well, whether or not you knew that you wanted such a thing, you can now perfectly simulate it in Minecraft, as this addon allows for better interconnectivity between the popular Pokémon mod [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and the town-building datapack [New In Town](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-in-town), as well as [New In Town Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-in-town-dimensions) by introducing new structures for you New In Town town/fortress/end city/fleet/mine directly linked to Cobblemon, such as these:
- Town:
> - Pokécenter
> - Pokémart
> - Apricorn Farm
> - Mint Farm
> - Pokémon Nursery
- Nether Fortress:
> - Pokémon Infirmary
> - Pokéball Forge
- End City:
> - Pokéball Synthesizer
- Boat Fleet (NIT: Dimensions required):
> - Pokécenter Vessel
- Mine (NIT Dimensions required):
> - Evolution Stone Drill
